title: ASM’s Revenue Outlook Beats Estimates on AI Investments, China

title: Canada courts Indian researchers amid US funding unease
description: Indian researchers are now looking at Canada for doctoral and postdoctoral studies. This shift is driven by concerns over research funding and visa stability in the United States. Canada's new initiatives signal clearer long-term research career prospects. Fields like artificial intelligence and healthcare are seeing this trend. This reassessment focuses on risk management and stable research environments.
content:

title: Anthropic's Claude AI being used in Iran war by U.S. military, sources say
description: Two sources familiar with the U.S. military's use of artificial intelligence confirm that the U.S. used Anthropic's Claude AI model over weekend for the attack on Iran — and is still using it.
content:
Two sources familiar with the U.S. military's use of artificial intelligence confirm that the U.S. used Anthropic's Claude AI model over weekend for the attack on Iran — and is still using it.

title: High-tech snowplows and AI help cities clean up from big storms
description: Cities across the U.S. have been integrating video monitoring, GPS mapping and artificial intelligence into snow removal operations that once relied almost entirely on manual planning.
content:
Residents of Syracuse, New York — America’s snowiest city — once barraged a service hotline with street neglect complaints during blizzards, even if plows had passed two hours earlier but the work was hidden by fresh snow.

title: Elon Musk's X, xAI plan to repay $17.5 billion in debt in full
description: ELON Musk’s social media platform X and artificial intelligence startup xAI plan to repay in full about $17.5 billion in debt tied to the companies, Bloomberg News reported on Monday, citing people familiar with the matter.
